title: Bazinga Explosions
description: Replaces the explosion sounds with Sheldon Cooper
body:
Replaces the explosion sounds effects with versions that feature Sheldon Cooper from the hit sitcom "The Big Bang Theory" saying his iconic catchphrase ("Bazinga").

This is desirable because it is subjectively funny.

Here is a video showing the results of using this resource pack: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qdiWEs1795s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
